gamma_handling: lambda(q,nu) reconstructed from gamma (GHz->Ry) + |omega| (cm-1->Ry) via Allen lambda=gamma/(pi N(Ef) omega^2); immune to QE '********' overflow. Imaginary modes (omega^2<0) excluded from positive-omega a2F grid and counted as instability flag.

wall.dominant_divergent_mode: q1 mode13/14, omega~0.0 cm-1, lambda~3.15e10 per mode
wall.interpretation: All assembled values non-physical (off by orders of magnitude). Structure dynamically unstable (52% imaginary modes) + Gamma-acoustic 1/omega^2 divergence (acoustic sum rule not enforced). No physical lambda/omega_log/Tc can be assembled from this DFPT output.

caveat: 2x2x2-q (4 irreducible) mesh is too coarse for a converged Tc (production needs >=4x4x4-q); HOWEVER the dominant wall is NOT mesh resolution but (1) 44/84 imaginary phonon modes (dynamically unstable cell -- unrelaxed / wrong pressure) and (2) Gamma-acoustic 1/omega^2 divergence. Mesh densification cannot fix an unstable lattice.
qe_xval_note: QFORGE per-mode lambda reconstruction reproduces QE-printed lambda exactly: q1 mode15 sigma=0.020 reconstructed=4.66486 vs QE printed=4.6649 (rel-eps ~1e-5). Confirms parser/units correct; the divergence is in the DATA, not the assembler. CaH6 hybrid assembler separately gate-grade at rel-eps=1.65e-7.
qe_postproc_crosscheck: NOT RUN -- no QE binaries (lambda.x/matdyn.x) on local host. QE itself emitted '********' for the divergent modes, so even QE could not print a total lambda from this data.

literature_anchor.source: Troyan et al. Adv. Mater. 33, 2006832 (2021); Kong 2021 -- YH6 Tc 224 K

breakthrough_paths: Re-relax Im-3m YH6 at 166 GPa (vc-relax, converge force/stress) then re-fire DFPT -- imaginary modes should vanish
Pressure scan to stabilization pressure (~120-300 GPa literature window) to remove imaginary modes
Enforce acoustic sum rule (matdyn asr='crystal') on dyn matrices before el-ph to zero Gamma-acoustic divergence
After stable cell secured, densify to >=4x4x4-q production mesh for converged Tc
honesty_note: c9/d6 -- non-physical assembled values recorded verbatim, NOT fitted to literature 224 K. Assembler correctness (CaH6 1.65e-7, YH6 mode-lambda 1e-5) separated from the input-data wall.
